battleTraits.name: Royal Imperative
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Battle (Army), Any Combat Phase
battleTraits.declare: You can only use this ability in the third battle round.
battleTraits.effect:
Pick 1 of the following effects to apply for the rest of the battle round:
- Into Them!: Friendly units have STRIKE-FIRST.
- Strike Sure: Friendly units’ melee weapons have Crit (Mortal).

enhancements.name: Dutiful Souls
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general to be the target.
enhancements.effect: You can return 1 slain model to the target unit. If the target is an INFANTRY unit, you can return D3 slain models to it instead.

enhancements.name: Voltaic Charge
enhancements.effect: Your general’s Akhelian Royal Weapons have Charge (+1 Damage).

enhancements.name: Soul Stealer
enhancements.effect: If your general is in combat, Heal (D3) your general.

regimentAbilities.name: The Spear of Asphoren
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit that is not in combat to use this ability.
regimentAbilities.effect: Add 1 to charge rolls for that unit for the rest of the turn.

regimentAbilities.name: The Shield of Ulchiss
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit in combat to use this ability.
regimentAbilities.effect: For the rest of the turn, each time that unit uses a RETREAT ability, no mortal damage is inflicted on it.

weapons.name: Deepmare’s Fangs, Talons and Lashing Tails

abilities.name: Raiders' Resolve
abilities.declare: Pick another friendly unit wholly within this unit’s combat range to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add 1 to save rolls for the target until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: Wave Rider
abilities.declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.

abilities.name: Biovoltaic Blast
abilities.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Charge Phase
abilities.declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a number of dice equal to the number of models in this unit. Add 1 to each roll if there are more models in the target unit than this unit. For each 3+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.

abilities.name: Biovoltaic Barrier
abilities.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic of the target’s weapons for the rest of the turn.

abilities.name: Strike on the Move
abilities.effect: This unit can use SHOOT abilities even if it used a RUN or RETREAT ability in the same turn.
